text.title: Lessons Learned Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (milestone_count, peer_projects_in_portfolio, psychological_safety) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: apply full lessons-learned with cross-team publication
apply lessons-learned locally; no cross-team channel yet
fix culture first; blame-laden retros destroy learning
no measurable outcomes — defer until milestones exist

text.example: milestone_count=3 → psychological_safety=true → peer_projects_in_portfolio=5 → apply full lessons-learned (rule publish-cross-team).
